universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, active status, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps as the dominant slicing axis due to the high weight on conversion rate.
name: High-conversion: Open preventive care gap
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT cg.member_id FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) IN ('preventive', 'chronic')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT mc.member_id FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE LOWER(mc.icd10_code) IN ('E11', 'I10') AND LOWER(mc.status) = 'active') AND m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT a.member_id FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years')
rationale: Members with an open preventive care gap are structurally more likely to convert. This bucket is optimized for conversion rate due to the high weight on this metric. The suggested treatment should emphasize the importance of preventive care and the availability of appointments.
suggested_treatment: Highlight the importance of preventive care and the availability of appointments for members with an open preventive care gap.
coverage_note: The bucket set covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, active status, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and with an active enrollment. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, active status, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps as the dominant slicing axis due to the high weight on conversion rate.
name: Medium-conversion: Replied to prior SMS
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT se.member_id FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT mc.member_id FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE LOWER(mc.icd10_code) IN ('E11', 'I10') AND LOWER(mc.status) = 'active') AND m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT a.member_id FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years')
rationale: Members who have replied to prior SMS messages are more likely to engage with the campaign. This bucket is optimized for open rate and click rate due to the weights on these metrics. The suggested treatment should be personalized and timely, considering the member's prior engagement.
suggested_treatment: Send a personalized and timely SMS message to members who have replied to prior SMS messages, considering their prior engagement.
coverage_note: The bucket set covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, active status, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and with an active enrollment. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, active status, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps as the dominant slicing axis due to the high weight on conversion rate.
name: Medium-conversion: Delivered but no interaction
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT se.member_id FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE LOWER(se.event_type) = 'delivered' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se2 WHERE se2.member_id = se.member_id AND LOWER(se2.event_type) IN ('replied', 'opt_out') AND se2.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT mc.member_id FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE LOWER(mc.icd10_code) IN ('E11', 'I10') AND LOWER(mc.status) = 'active') AND m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT a.member_id FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years')
rationale: Members who have received prior SMS messages but have not interacted with them are a weaker bucket. This bucket is optimized for open rate due to the weight on this metric. The suggested treatment should be less urgent and more informative, considering the member's prior engagement.
suggested_treatment: Send a less urgent and more informative SMS message to members who have received prior SMS messages but have not interacted with them, considering their prior engagement.
coverage_note: The bucket set covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, active status, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and with an active enrollment. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, active status, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps as the dominant slicing axis due to the high weight on conversion rate.
name: Low-conversion: No recent SMS engagement
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT mc.member_id FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE LOWER(mc.icd10_code) IN ('E11', 'I10') AND LOWER(mc.status) = 'active') AND m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT a.member_id FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years')
rationale: Members with no recent SMS engagement are the least likely to convert. This bucket is optimized for open rate due to the weight on this metric. The suggested treatment should be more informative and less urgent, considering the member's lack of prior engagement.
suggested_treatment: Send a more informative and less urgent SMS message to members with no recent SMS engagement, considering their lack of prior engagement.
coverage_note: The bucket set covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, active status, SMS opted-in, not suppressed, and with an active enrollment. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.
